per_outcome.operationalization: Ratio of suggestions accepted by developer to total suggestions shown, averaged across team members; partial acceptance counts as full acceptance.
Ratio of lines of code accepted from Copilot suggestions to total lines of code shown in suggestions.
Net satisfaction score: difference between positive sentiment scores and negative sentiment scores on five-category scale from Very satisfied to Very unsatisfied.
Self-reported rating of overall experience with GitHub Copilot on 1-10 scale.
Self-reported rating of perceived productivity improvement when using GitHub Copilot on 1-10 scale.
Assessment of how well GitHub Copilot suggestions align with existing coding standards, rated categorically from good to excellent.
Self-reported confidence in assessing security vulnerabilities when using GitHub Copilot on 1-10 scale.
Self-reported awareness of sensitive information exposure risks when using GitHub Copilot on 1-10 scale.
Self-reported consideration of security in development practices when using GitHub Copilot on 1-10 scale.
Percentage of respondents reporting time reduction and median percentage reduction in task completion time when using GitHub Copilot.
Percentage of respondents reporting ability to complete more tasks per sprint when using GitHub Copilot.
Percentage of respondents reporting improved work quality when using GitHub Copilot.
